c00000.title: faq account creation
c00000.text:
# Account Creation

## How do I create an account?

To create an account, click the "Sign Up" button on the homepage.
Enter your email address, create a password, and confirm your email.

You must use a valid email address because a verification link will be sent to your inbox.

## Why didn’t I receive a verification email?

If you did not receive a verification email:
- Check your spam or junk folder.
- Ensure you entered the correct email address.
- Wait a few minutes, as delivery may be delayed.

If the email still does not arrive, you can request a new verification link from the login page.

## Can I change my email address later?

Yes. You can update your email address from your account settings page.
You will need to verify the new email before the change becomes active.

c00001.title: faq account management
c00001.text:
# Account Management

## How do I update my profile information?

Go to Account Settings and select "Profile".
You can update your name, company information, and contact details.

## How do I delete my account?

To delete your account:
1. Go to Account Settings.
2. Select "Delete Account".
3. Confirm the deletion.

Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.

## What happens to my data after deletion?

All personal data is permanently removed within 30 days.

c00002.title: faq billing
c00002.text:
# Billing and Payments

## What payment methods are supported?

We support credit cards and debit cards through secure payment processing.

## When will I be charged?

You are charged at the beginning of each billing cycle.
Monthly plans are billed every 30 days.

## Can I get a refund?

Refunds are evaluated on a case-by-case basis.
Please contact customer support within 14 days of your billing date.

c00003.title: faq features
c00003.text:
# Product Features

## What are the main features of the platform?

The platform includes:
- Dashboard analytics
- Project management tools
- Collaboration features
- Exportable reports

## Can I export my data?

Yes. You can export reports in CSV format from the Reports section.

## Is there a mobile app?

Currently, the platform is optimized for web browsers.
A mobile app is planned for a future release.

c00004.title: faq login
c00004.text:
# Login and Authentication

## I forgot my password. What should I do?

Click the "Forgot Password" link on the login page.
Enter your registered email address, and we will send you a password reset link.

The reset link expires after 30 minutes for security reasons.

## Why is my account locked?

Your account may be temporarily locked after multiple failed login attempts.
Please wait 15 minutes before trying again or reset your password.

## Can I stay logged in?

Yes. When logging in, you can select the "Remember Me" option.
This keeps you logged in on your device for up to 7 days.

c00005.title: faq security
c00005.text:
# Security and Data Protection

## How is my data protected?

We use encryption in transit and at rest.
All communication is secured using HTTPS.

## Do you store passwords in plain text?

No. Passwords are hashed using industry-standard cryptographic hashing algorithms.

## How can I enable two-factor authentication?

You can enable two-factor authentication (2FA) from your Security Settings page.
Follow the instructions to connect your authenticator app.

c00006.title: faq subscription
c00006.text:
# Subscription Plans

## What subscription plans are available?

We offer three subscription plans:
- Basic
- Pro
- Enterprise

Each plan includes different feature sets and usage limits.

## Can I upgrade my subscription?

Yes. You can upgrade your subscription at any time from the Billing section of your account settings.
Upgrades take effect immediately.

## Can I downgrade my subscription?

Yes. Downgrades will take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

c00007.title: faq support
c00007.text:
# Customer Support

## How can I contact support?

You can contact support through the Help section inside the platform.

## What are your support hours?

Support is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM (UTC).

## Do you offer priority support?

Priority support is available for Enterprise plan customers.
